title: Nyan of Duty - Cat Ops
description:
*I've seen lots of comments regarding epilepsy, so I'd like say to epileptics in capital letters: *SEIZURE WARNING!!* Also, potato.

Call of Duty Black Ops Gun Sounds x Nyan Cat

More Nyan for your Nyan. Nyan Cat decides to invade Call of Duty Black Ops. I wouldn't care if you guys hate COD, just enjoy the video.
